Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-27 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long MTZ dominates today's ranking at position 1 with a composite score of 90.6, driven by extraordinary long-term performance of 1,704% over 10 years and a clean momentum signal of 1.6. The stock passes 4 out of 5 momentum ratio thresholds and trades above all major moving averages, though it significantly outpaced SPY by 1,462% over the decade, raising questions about sustainability. EFXT ranks second with similarly strong near-term momentum—285.67% over 1 year with accelerating quarterly ratios (2.56x, 2.2x, 2.55x)—but shows a red flag in its 10-year relative performance, underperforming SPY by 49.23% and QQQ by 304.61%, suggesting recent strength may not reflect deep secular trend. Both leaders pass all short-to-medium term moving average filters, but the divergence between MTZ's decade-long dominance and EFXT's recent surge indicates the dashboard is capturing two distinct momentum patterns: one deeply rooted and one emergent.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
